'''Galen Panos''' was the [[High Lord]] of [[House Reena/Legends|House Reena]] during the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] Era, and at the time of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], had been in office for about 30 [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. His reign as High Lord was quiet, in contrast to his predecessor. He was popular with the public and the influential nobles of his house alike and seemed content with House Reena's position in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. Under Galen's leadership, House Reena controlled the votes in the [[Great Council (Tapani Federation)|Great Council]] that gave the [[House Mecetti|Mecetti]]-[[House Calipsa|Calipsa]]-[[House Reena/Legends|Reena]] coalition power.

Lord Panos was a former dean of the [[Reena University/Legends|Reena University]] and kept his influence and interest in the affair of the institution. He was a brilliant man who held degrees in a number of scientific fields, and was a master [[Computer/Legends|computer]] programmer. Although not widely known, he had a [[neuro-computer jack]] to facilitate the download of information directly into his [[Brain/Legends|brain]].
